Dinner & Award Ceremony
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 115 --

How was the first day?
Did you find it valuable?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 115 --

From the first dinner until now we have...
ABQ Aug 2017: 5 Employees
ABQ Jan 2018: 18 Employees
Austin June 2018: 48 Employees
Austin Jan 2019: 88 Employees
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 115 --

I always love showing where we have been
because it shows how much we can accomplish
as a group…
And...its really good for my mental health since I
(probably just like you) only think about where we
can improve, NOT what we have achieved.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 115 --

In the past year, we’ve learned a lot about the
gym business and the service business overall…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 115 --

...Most of all from YOU
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 115 --

Which made me wonder...why is this group more
innovative than groups in the past? (or any that
I’ve been a part of)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 115 --

Because this is the only community that I am
aware of that does not say “take the easy route
and outsource it”...but instead
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 115 --

LEARN…
BECOME BETTER…
INCREASE YOUR SKILL SET…
BECOME MORE VALUABLE…
TREAT EVERYONE IN YOUR WORLD AS
SPECIAL...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 115 --

And once a group of entrepreneurs with similar
challenges comes together WITH SKILLS there’s
not much that can stop them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 115 --

And part of that is because our model is not
predicated on you NEEDING us.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 115 --

Which was the scariest jump in the world, but
now, the best decision we’ve ever made
strategically.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 115 --

Which is always why Gym Launch & Gym
Legacy first and foremost will be about
TEACHING how to fish, never fishing for.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 115 --

Because if the goal is FREEDOM, how can we in
the same breath say…
...“but you need to pay us for this critical business
function” (like lead gen, or sales, etc.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 115 --

And so I wanted to THANK YOU for making this
how you function within this ecosystem...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 115 --

And the extent to which this community has
become a giving community, in abundance, is
insane.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 115 --

It’s one of the things that I think makes this
community so special and so unique.
And why we will so fiercely protect it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 115 --

So THANK YOU for helping us protect it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

WORRY OF SCARCITY.

together...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

care?”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

problems repeated again and
again...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

teams :P
